parameters.query: ={{ (() => { const b = $json; const a = b.action; const q = []; q.push("CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS gda_discussions (id SERIAL PRIMARY KEY, session_id TEXT, page_context TEXT, user_query TEXT NOT NULL, ai_response TEXT, source_tool TEXT, pinned BOOLEAN DEFAULT false, tags TEXT[], created_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT NOW())"); if (a === 'save') { const sid = (b.session_id||'sess-'+Date.now()).replace(/'/g,"''"); const ctx = (b.page_context||'unknown').replace(/'/g,"''"); const uq = (b.user_query||'').replace(/'/g,"''"); const ar = (b.ai_response||'').replace(/'/g,"''"); const st = (b.source_tool||'assistant').replace(/'/g,"''"); q.push(`INSERT INTO gda_discussions (session_id, page_context, user_query, ai_response, source_tool) VALUES ('${sid}','${ctx}','${uq}','${ar}','${st}')`); q.push('SELECT id, session_id, page_context, created_at FROM gda_discussions ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT 1'); } else if (a === 'list') { const ctx = b.page_context ? `WHERE page_context = '${(b.page_context||'').replace(/'/g,"''")}'` : ''; const lim = b.limit || 20; q.push(`SELECT id, session_id, page_context, user_query, LEFT(ai_response, 200) as ai_preview, source_tool, pinned, created_at FROM gda_discussions ${ctx} ORDER BY pinned DESC, created_at DESC LIMIT ${lim}`); } else if (a === 'get') { q.push(`SELECT * FROM gda_discussions WHERE id = ${parseInt(b.id)||0}`); } else if (a === 'pin') { q.push(`UPDATE gda_discussions SET pinned = NOT pinned WHERE id = ${parseInt(b.id)||0} RETURNING id, pinned`); } else if (a === 'search') { const term = (b.query||'').replace(/'/g,"''"); q.push(`SELECT id, session_id, page_context, user_query, LEFT(ai_response, 200) as ai_preview, pinned, created_at FROM gda_discussions WHERE user_query ILIKE '%${term}%' OR ai_response ILIKE '%${term}%' ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT 20`); } return q.join('; '); })() }}

parameters.responseBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ success: true, action: $('Route Action').first().json.action, data: $json }) }}
